class.name: GeometryVector
class.description: [GeometryVector] stores a [code]gp_Vec[/code] value and exposes basic vector arithmetic to GDScript. It is intended as a foundational geometry type for later build123d-style APIs.

method.name: set_vector3
method.description: Copies the value from a Godot [Vector3].

method.name: get_vector3
method.description: Returns the vector as a Godot [Vector3].

method.name: dot
method.description: Returns the dot product with [param other].

method.name: add
method.description: Returns a new vector equal to this vector plus [param other].

method.name: subtract
method.description: Returns a new vector equal to this vector minus [param other].

method.name: cross
method.description: Returns the cross product with [param other].

method.name: scaled
method.description: Returns a scaled copy of the vector.
